NWS Storm Survey concluded that a brief EF-1 Tornado occurred. Estimated winds were 95-105 mph along with a path width of 30 yards and path length of 0.1 miles. Tornado started at 425 CDT and ended at 426pm CDT. Damage to a large building, and other outbuildings at a residence were noted.
